name: harness-kit-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting Harness Kit — a portable, multi-runtime engineering harness (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, omp/oh-my-pi).

plugins.name: harness-kit
plugins.description: Portable engineering harness (plan → work → verify → feedback) + an introspect skill that tailors a repo's config to its stack. Agents, skills, and hooks for Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode.

plugins.name: harness-kit-omp
plugins.description: omp (oh-my-pi) target: an omp-native role/verify agent fleet, verification skills, TTSR render/backend guards, a deterministic harness-check audit device, and per-project setup templates (RULES / WATCHDOG / config / lsp / mcp).
